name: ifq-design-skills
description: IFQ Design Skills — skill package for AI coding agents (Anthropic/OpenAI SKILL.md format). The core design loop is ZERO-install: write HTML → print a file:// preview URL → iterate. Heavy dependencies (playwright/pdf-lib/pptxgenjs/sharp) are only required when you actually export to MP4/GIF/PDF/PPTX, and are therefore listed under optionalDependencies. `npm install --omit=optional` works and keeps the skill lightweight. Install the optional deps on-demand only when an export pipeline asks for them.
author: ifq.ai

scripts.verify:ci: npm run sync:year -- --check && npm run smoke
scripts.install:export: npm install --no-save playwright pdf-lib pptxgenjs sharp && npx playwright install chromium

systemRequirements.note: The core design loop (HTML + preview in system browser + lite verify) requires ZERO system installs. The items below are ONLY needed when the user actually asks for an export.
systemRequirements.ffmpeg: >=4.4  (ONLY for MP4/GIF export; install via `brew install ffmpeg` or `apt install ffmpeg`)
systemRequirements.python: >=3.9  (ONLY for the deep variant of verify.py — the lite variant `verify-lite.mjs` is pure Node, no python)
systemRequirements.chromium: ONLY for MP4/PDF/PPTX export; install via `npm run install:export` (pulls playwright + peers + chromium in one shot)
